other_observers: Mark Kroschel, Salida, CO; It's slightly complicated... birds were photographed by Matt Kroschel at the local paper, which sent the photo to Susan Tweit for ID. Susan forwarded photo to me. I then contacted the paper to find out where the birds had been photographed and w
specific_location: Farm pond on County Road 163, east of Big Bend Recreation Area. Also pasture on County Road 160, between and opposite Frantz Lake and Mt Ouray State Wildlife Areas.
description: Large, white birds with long, dark bills. Edge of bill is straight at gape, lores dark and well-connected to the eye. No yellow in lores.Behaviors: Birds were at rest in a pond near the Arkansas River or in pastures nearby. Later observers noted a lot of preening, bathing behavior. Nothing particular to identification.Call: none heardPlumage: all adult
